title: Sony’s $4,900 FX5 cinema camera looks stacked and is stacked.
summary: To name a few: a full-frame fully-stacked 5K sensor with open gate recording, three base ISO settings, dual gain shooting, and up to 120fps recording. If you buy something from a Verge link, Vox Media may earn a commission.
